model_specification_line: model = smf.ols("full_time ~ treatment + C(year)", data=df, weights=df["perwt"])
sample_selection: hispand in {100, 102, 103, 104, 105, 106, 107} to capture Mexican-origin Hispanic respondents
citizen status in {2, 3} to focus on non-citizens or non-reported respondents
age between 18 and 40 in each survey year
